name: comfyui-codex
description: Codex guidance for ComfyUI installation, Manager, custom nodes, APIs, workflows, troubleshooting, and agent-safe execution.

interface.shortDescription: Build, run, and debug ComfyUI workflows.
interface.longDescription: ComfyUI Codex gives Codex a focused operating guide for ComfyUI installation paths, ComfyUI-Manager, custom nodes, local ComfyUI Server API work, Comfy Cloud API context, workflow JSON authoring, model troubleshooting, beginner onboarding, and agent-safe workflow execution patterns derived from the official ComfyUI docs, ComfyUI-Agent-Kit, and ComfyUI Skills OpenClaw.
defaultPrompt: Use $comfyui to debug my ComfyUI workflow.
Use $comfyui to build an API-format workflow.
Use $comfyui to explain ComfyUI to a beginner.
